taxonomy: Solenomelus gladioloides is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. It belongs to the genus Solenomelus, which is a group of flowering plants that are native to southern Africa. The classification of Solenomelus gladioloides is further refined to the tribe Hesperoneae and the subfamily Amaryllidoideae. This specific classification is based on the plant's physical characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other Amaryllidaceae species. The exact classification may be subject to ongoing research and revision.
